title: Confirm npx supabase status -o json output shape
description:
## Objective
Resolve open question from the spec: exact field names in supabase status JSON output. Don't guess — run it and read.

## Spec Reference
.devmeta/projects/2026-05-21-seeder-scaffold/2026-05-21-seeder-scaffold-spec.md — Section: Step 3 / Open questions

## Scope
**Files:** none modified yet — research task. Findings get pasted into context-log.md.

## Implementation
1. Ensure Supabase is running locally (make start-supabase if not)
2. Run: npx supabase status -o json
3. Capture the actual JSON shape — note the exact key names for the API URL and the service-role key
4. Append a short note to .devmeta/projects/2026-05-21-seeder-scaffold/context-log.md with the discovered field names so the next task can write a correct parser

## Tests
Run: npx supabase status -o json (must produce valid JSON; non-zero exit means Supabase isn't running — start it)
Do NOT close until the JSON output is captured and field names documented in context-log.md.
acceptance_criteria: Field names for API URL and service-role key documented in context-log.md
